The [[zZip Motor Concepts]] '''Gladiator walker''' was a personal bipedal [[Walker/Legends|walker]] vehicle used in gladiatorial combat.

==Characteristics==
Designed from the [[All Terrain Scout Transport/Legends|All Terrain Scout Transport]] and [[All Terrain Personal Transport/Legends|All Terrain Personal Transport]] blueprints, each walker boasted shields and a light [[Blaster cannon/Legends|blaster cannon]]. The [[SecuriTech]] made a similar design. They were equipped with an emergency shut down system, which would cut power if an occupant was in danger of being injured.
